message:
test: update tests for RRefAccess oracle variant, cancel fairness, and 13-invariant conformal coverage

Updates test suite across 7 files to align with the new cancel
acknowledgment infrastructure, RRefAccess oracle violation variant,
and 13-invariant conformal calibration surface.

- cancellation_stress_e2e.rs: clippy fixes replacing manual iterator
  patterns with idiomatic equivalents and removing unnecessary .clone()
- conformal_calibration.rs: update from 12 to 13 invariants; use
  ALL_ORACLE_INVARIANTS.len() for assertion instead of hardcoded count
- e2e_geodesic_normalization.rs: add OracleViolation::RRefAccess match
  arm to exhaustive pattern matches
- golden_outputs.rs: add OracleViolation::RRefAccess match arm
- lab_execution.rs: add test_lab_cancel_fairness_bound test verifying
  cancel lane fairness under mixed workloads with deterministic seeds
- proof_artifact_manifest.rs: test updates for proof artifact changes
- runtime_e2e.rs: test adjustments for updated runtime behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
